scripts.build: rm -rf dist && npm run site:build && npm run puzzles:build
scripts.infra:deploy: npm run site:build && npm --prefix infra run deploy
scripts.puzzles:build: rm -rf dist/puzzles && mkdir -p dist/puzzles && cp -R puzzles/. dist/puzzles/
scripts.puzzles:deploy: npm run puzzles:build && aws s3 sync dist/puzzles s3://dancinglinks-sudoku-solver-puzzles/puzzles --delete && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id E2E3427N1NDFOA --paths '/puzzles/*' '/api/puzzles/random'
